# Open Science Pillars Tutorials {.unnumbered}

Placeholder. Tutorials authored in Sessions 11-12 per SPECIFICATION.md
v0.5.1 §7: Tutorial 1 (Getting Started, ~10 min), Tutorial 2 (ECCO
meridional heat transport with the SWOT section, ~20 min), Tutorial 3
(Build a Domain Plugin, ~30 min). Each tutorial header records the surfaces
it was verified on. Tutorials are Quarto; verification and demos are marimo.
